# CWE-15 positive: external control of configuration setting
lang: go
file: CWE-15-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// CWE-15 External Control of System or Configuration Setting
// Vulnerable line: gorm.Open uses client-supplied DSN from the request.
func ApplyRuntimeDSN(c *gin.Context, factory func(string) (*gorm.DB, error)) {
	dsn := c.Query("dsn")
	db, err := factory(dsn)
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "database"})
		return
	}
	c.Set("db", db)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
